title: Bridge Essay: Aesthetic experiences across visual perception and mental imagery: Behaviorally

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Imaginal** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Phase Imaginal bridge-v3 targeted acquisition.

**Aesthetic experiences across visual perception and mental imagery: Behaviorally indistinguishable, neurally distinct.** — iScience (2025). PMID: 40491490. DOI: 10.1016/j.isci.2025.112588. Score: 58. Studies suggest that vivid mental imagery can blur the boundaries between reality and imagination in simple detection tasks by eliciting similar neural patterns. The question arises as to whether aesthetic experiences can similarly emerge through imagery or whether these complex experiences necessitate direct input into the sensory system.
